name: accounting firms managing 10-50 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10-50 clients processing 20-100 invoices/month, discrepancies cause inaccurate financial reporting. We provide a subscription-based data reconciliation tool instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Inaccurate financial reporting due to discrepancies across systems.
